discrepancies.summary: 075 synthesizer_decision_packet.md does not enumerate a literal multi-option PICK menu (cf. 077's 10 options or 079's 7 options); only emits a single verdict (STRUCTURAL_MISMATCH) plus contingent-076 forward-pointer plus 4 carry-forward + 2 NEW open questions.
discrepancies.resolution: Phase B emitted dossier_decision_vector_075.md with explicit META-policy disclosure of structural-label decomposition (4 leaves) and forwarded to amendment note N-080-6 for synth review.

discrepancies.summary: Relay-080 envelope section 7 references 'arXiv mirror submission', 'Zenodo umbrella v2.1 deposit', and 'Item-26 splice' as post-LANE-1 envelopes (currently UNNUMBERED placeholders), but no corresponding event is named in any of the 5 dossier handoffs or 076 GATED preflight envelope (the substrate set restricted by spec section 2.D).
discrepancies.resolution: Phase D temporal_ordering_dag.md surfaced these as <gap-1>, <gap-2>, <gap-3> derivation-gap edges and forwarded to amendment notes N-080-2, N-080-3, N-080-4.

discrepancies.summary: 077 packet does not name a discrete X-event for any PICK_Bn deposit; only 'Synthesizer review of 077 dossier at W21 LANE-1 to pick from the 10-option decision menu' (handoff Recommended next step).
discrepancies.resolution: Phase D surfaced as <gap-4> derivation-gap edge and forwarded to amendment note N-080-5.

discrepancies.summary: 074 -> 078 coupling chain admits both OUTPUT-COUPLED and TEMPORAL-COUPLED readings (multi-step indirect chain via PCF-1 v1.4 amendment -> mirror status -> G2 OPTIONAL fire). Strength of coupling cannot be definitively resolved from substrate at fire time.
discrepancies.resolution: Phase C cross_dossier_coupling_matrix.md tagged as AMBIGUOUS [COUPLING-C3] with documentation in matrix section C.4 of the secondary TEMPORAL reading; forwarded to amendment note N-080-1.

discrepancies.summary: 075 raises 2 NEW open questions (OQ-075-PRIMITIVE-CANONICAL canonicalization scope; OQ-075-076-DRAFTING-LANE timing) for synth review. Per HALT_080_NEW_QUESTION_INTRODUCED these were not introduced by the agent at 080 but pre-existing in 075 substrate; they trace back to 075 handoff Anomalies section 'Open questions for Claude'.
discrepancies.resolution: Phase F amendment notes N-080-7 and N-080-8 documented these as 075-substrate-traced questions, not 080-agent-introduced ones.
